executors.name: 消息日志
executors.code: console.log('[Script Executor] 消息触发:', { name: ctx.message?.name, mes: ctx.message?.mes?.slice(0, 80), chatLen: ctx.chat?.length, group: ctx.group?.id });

executors.name: 回合日志
executors.code: console.log('[Script Executor] 回合结束:', { chatLen: ctx.chat?.length, characters: ctx.characters?.length, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() });

executors.name: 双触发追踪
executors.code: const mode = ctx.message ? '消息' : '回合'; console.log('[Script Executor] 双触发:', mode, '| shared keys:', Object.keys(ctx.shared).join(',') || '(空)'); return { lastMode: mode, lastTime: Date.now() };

executors.name: 共享状态接力-A
executors.code: console.log('[Script Executor] A 写入共享状态: x=42'); return { x: 42, fromA: true };

executors.name: 共享状态接力-B
executors.code: console.log('[Script Executor] B 读取: x=' + ctx.shared.x + ', fromA=' + ctx.shared.fromA); return { fromB: ctx.shared.x * 2 };

executors.name: 共享状态接力-C
executors.code: console.log('[Script Executor] C 汇总:', { x: ctx.shared.x, fromA: ctx.shared.fromA, fromB: ctx.shared.fromB });

executors.name: 参数测试
executors.code: console.log('[Script Executor] 参数测试:', { threshold: ctx.params.threshold, verbose: ctx.params.verbose, label: ctx.params.label });

executors.name: 决策日志
executors.code: console.log('[Script Executor] 决策触发 ===='); console.log('speakers:', ctx.decision?.speakers); console.log('names:', ctx.decision?.names); console.log('reason:', ctx.decision?.reason?.slice(0, 100)); console.log('shared from before:', Object.keys(ctx.shared).join(',') || '(空)');

executors.name: 决策修改器
executors.code: console.log('[Script Executor] 决策修改器: 原始 speakers =', ctx.decision?.speakers); if (ctx.decision && ctx.decision.speakers.length > 0) { var last = ctx.decision.speakers[ctx.decision.speakers.length - 1]; var first = ctx.decision.speakers[0]; ctx.decision.speakers[0] = last; ctx.decision.speakers[ctx.decision.speakers.length - 1] = first; console.log('[Script Executor] 交换首尾:', ctx.decision.speakers); } return { modified: true };
